item.title: The Sight
item.description:
The Sight

I recently set up a shared digital picture frame that I’ve started calling The Sight.

The idea is simple: if something catches your eye and makes you think, “Spyke would appreciate this,” I’d love to see it too.

It might be a beautiful landscape, an interesting object, your latest project, a rainy afternoon, your pets, your travels, or simply an ordinary moment that felt worth noticing.

If you’d like to contribute, just mention The Sight to me and I’ll send you an invitation through Aura Frames.

Unlike a social feed, nothing here is selected by an algorithm. Every image appears on my desk because someone chose to share it. Each one is a small glimpse into another person’s world—a sight offered from one observer to another.

item.title: See_You_At_Sunrise
item.description:
Day 1

Inside out. Did major cutting on my shirt. Perfect! Perfect! Forgot what we ate day one. Oh! I think it was peanut butter oats with apple crisp topping at Winnie and Ethels Diner.

Day 2

Squirtle squad! Blowing bubble attacks on people was fun! Another sunrise and another lineup schedule that was awesome. I know I had something but I don’t remember what. Oh! A donut, fruity pebbles. It was loaded with frosting and rolled in cereal. I had a vanilla coffee with almond milk I think. We hunted collectibles, visiting all the stages. The car ride home was looooong.

Day 3

Freezing wind! I survived. Made it to the car. Lumpia and bulgogi.

item.title: Terminal Ritual
item.description: Small remote magic tonight. Is this digital scrying? Anyway here’s a photo of the sun from my window.

item.title: Sunday Morning
item.description:
Hydra engaged. Gave it a snack and then it wouldn’t stop following me. This is a terribly coded attempt at metaphor for I logged into Disney+ at home (subscription accidentally renewed, not mine, but might as well use it). Well… when in rome… I searched for Disney Classics and got Scrubs, Designing Women, Bewitched (a good one). Guess I’ll be keeping an eye out for DVDs. I just can’t with 20 tags for your whole library. Anyway where is filtering? Disney’s Junk Drawer.

Anyway, the demon and I posted a reel. But he’s bound to the Darkroom because he gets into everything and I’m bound to him. We’ll make the best of it.

item.title: First Sighting
item.description: Perched at the dais the beams find me. Dust motes come to my rescue flying between me and discovery. I’ve just got one more thing to do here.
